title: Refuel machinery or vehicle
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Refuel machinery or vehicle demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Receive and store bulk fuel

pcs.text: Identify regulatory and industry requirements for the receipt and storage of bulk fuel, and refuelling operations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify regulatory and industry requirements for the receipt and storage of bulk fuel, and refuelling operations.
